arts.ttl: West Brom injury latest as Carlos Corberan reveals '50/50' chances
arts.sum: Albion are heading into their third fixture of the week having already tasted defeat at the hands of both Sheffield Wednesday and Middlesbrough. Diangana then suffered a fresh setback with his other shoulder at Wednesday, but has recovered well and has trained this week.

arts.ttl: Preview: West Bromwich Albion vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between West Bromwich Albion and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Neil Harris provides injury return updates as Millwall head into second international break
arts.sum: Millwall boss Neil Harris is only expecting Adam Mayor to be back in with a chance of being available after the international break to face Derby County. Midfielder Billy Micthell, who was a key player under Harris at the end of last season, has missed the start of the campaign with a quad injury.
